metadata.description: Cross-repo ops tooling and autonomous workflows for the Umbraco MCP repos — issue automation, branch housekeeping, and the self-learning loop that feeds improvements back into the repos and shared skills.

plugins.name: mcp-issue-loop
plugins.description: Work through GitHub issues labelled ready-for-ai in an Umbraco MCP repo, one worktree + subagent per issue (max 3 parallel), driving each to a CI-green PR, then responding to review feedback until approved and merged. Repo-agnostic; runs locally or as a scheduled cloud routine.

plugins.name: release-flow
plugins.description: Branching, merge, release, and dev-sync workflow skills for any repo — detects gitflow (dev + main) vs main-only and follows the matching conventions. Bundles release-and-branching, sync-dev, release-loop (human-gated, push-notified), and auto-release (issue+label-triggered, CI-gated release with no approval pause).

plugins.name: merge-flow
plugins.description: Guardrail loop that merges PRs labelled auto-merge — the maintainer's deliberate go-signal (the human approval, since you can't review-approve your own PR) — only once they are also CI-green, conflict-free, on the right base, and free of an unresolved 'changes requested'. Replaces error-prone manual merges. Uses /goal so a merge job is provably finished. Repo-agnostic; local or scheduled cloud routine.

plugins.name: github-ops
plugins.description: Shared reference for GitHub operations in both environments — gh CLI + git locally, the GitHub MCP server (mcp__github__*) on Claude web / in routines. One operation catalog, two reference files; the loop plugins point here instead of each re-explaining the dual path.

plugins.name: dependabot-rollup
plugins.description: Roll every open Dependabot security PR (excluding semver-major bumps) into one branch + PR, drive it to green CI, and close the superseded individual PRs. Repo-agnostic and safe to run unattended, locally or as a scheduled routine. Requires github-ops.
